aboutMe.title: About Me
aboutMe.description: Frontend developer with experience in mobile and web applications, focused on building smooth and visually attractive user experiences. Passionate about writing clean and maintainable code, applying clean architecture and development best practices. I enjoy working in teams, sharing knowledge, and continuously learning to add real value to every project.

responsibilities: Developed mobile interfaces using Flutter, contributing to the launch of two functional apps within tight deadlines.
Built modular and reusable components in Angular (v16–18), reducing code duplication by 30%.
Integrated REST APIs in close collaboration with backend developers.
Implemented interfaces using Tailwind CSS and Bootstrap.
Applied clean architecture and SOLID principles to ensure scalability and maintainability.
Mentored two interns: assigned tasks, reviewed code, provided technical guidance, and trained them in project best practices.
Developed a web application using Angular 16, TypeScript, and Bootstrap.
Implemented responsive UIs based on client-provided designs.
Supported integration testing and feature validation.
Collaborated with the tech team to align goals and outcomes.

softSkills.title: Soft Skills
items: Attention to detail and development best practices
